statusDefinitions.inventoried: Visible in the flat PNG and accounted for in this manifest.
statusDefinitions.needs-layer-generation: Should be regenerated into the next layered map pass.
statusDefinitions.needs-collision: Needs a final collision shape authored in Tiled.
statusDefinitions.needs-occlusion-mask: Needs a separate foreground sprite or mask for actor depth.
statusDefinitions.approved: Matches the reference closely enough for the current milestone.

roleDefinitions.ground-baked: Belongs in the generated base/ground layer and should not be a pasted runtime prop.
roleDefinitions.walkable-ground: Authored walkable navigation area. In manifest runtime, these polygons replace the default walkable rectangles for the object's actor zone.
roleDefinitions.blocking-ground: Visually baked into ground but blocks actor walking.
roleDefinitions.occluder: Separate foreground layer because actors can pass behind or under it.
roleDefinitions.decor-cluster: Small visual details tracked as a group; usually baked into ground.
roleDefinitions.interactive: A visible POI or prop that may need behavior in addition to art. It only becomes a foreground occluder when occlusion.required is true.

zones.label: Apex dojo garden
zones.notes: First manifest pass for the flat PNG top-left dojo area. Boxes are intentionally explicit so regeneration and Tiled placement have a shared source of truth.

zones.label: Shared center plaza
zones.notes: Shared path junction, center tree, circular planter, and transition details between agent areas. Label separately so Apex, Gale, and Metheus masks do not fight over it.

zones.label: Gale weather garden
zones.notes: Bottom-left weather area. Use for Gale-specific terrain, props, blockers, and occluders.

zones.label: Metheus observatory garden
zones.notes: Right-side observatory/library area. Use for Metheus-specific terrain, props, blockers, and occluders.

objects.label: Left stone lantern shrine cluster

collision.notes: Small blocker at the shrine base.

occlusion.notes: Tall stone lantern can hide actor heads.

objects.notes: Includes small surrounding flowers and base stones.

objects.label: Small fence behind training yard

occlusion.notes: Actor can pass behind or in front of bench.

objects.notes: This is one of the small reference details missing from the current ground layer.

objects.label: Main dojo building

occlusion.notes: Actors should pass in front of the lower stairs/porch, not through the building.

objects.notes: Use flat PNG silhouette as the target; current reused dojo is close but not final.

objects.label: Dojo front stairs

collision.notes: Final pass can decide whether stairs are walkable or only a threshold.

objects.notes: Should be baked into ground/stairs layer, not a separate floating prop.

objects.label: Dojo front pots and planters

collision.notes: Only final large pots need blockers if actors reach the porch.

objects.notes: Small detail cluster that should be baked with the dojo front.

objects.label: Red banners to the dojo right

occlusion.notes: Tall banners can cover actor heads in the back path.

objects.notes: Keep as separate occluder, not part of zen ground.

objects.label: Training yard floor and stone foundation

collision.notes: Base floor is mostly walkable; rail objects own blocking.

objects.notes: Should be generated into the ground layer, not pasted as a full prop.

objects.label: Training yard front-right rail

collision.notes: Right side of the front rail, excluding the stair opening.

occlusion.notes: Actors can be in front of or behind the front rail.

objects.notes: Split from the old broad front-rails box so the stair opening stays open.

occlusion.notes: Post should occlude actor legs when crossed.

objects.notes: Split from the old broad training-dummies group.

occlusion.notes: Post should occlude actor legs when crossed.

objects.notes: Split from the old broad training-dummies group.

objects.label: Front red training banner

occlusion.notes: Tall foreground banner can cover actors at platform stairs.

objects.notes: Current generated platform slice can accidentally include or omit this; track it separately.

objects.label: Left cliff edge, water, and waterfall beside training yard
objects.notes: Must remain in ground layer with collision, not a foreground sprite.

objects.label: Dojo front path and petal carpet

collision.notes: Main walkable transition between dojo, training yard, and zen garden.

objects.notes: Important for matching the flat PNG because the current ground layer loses many petal details.

objects.label: Black lantern below dojo

occlusion.notes: Tall lantern should hide actor upper body when behind it.

objects.notes: Currently absent from the layered prototype.

objects.label: Zen sand garden

collision.notes: Sand base can be walkable around rocks unless gameplay says otherwise.

objects.notes: Should be in the regenerated ground layer. Rocks become separate blockers/occluders.

objects.label: Left zen rock cluster
objects.notes: Do not generate this as a floating standalone prop with a rectangular edge.

objects.label: Back-left small zen stone
objects.notes: Split from the old broad zen-small-rocks cluster.

objects.label: Back-right small zen stone
objects.notes: Split from the old broad zen-small-rocks cluster.

objects.label: Right red banner by zen garden

occlusion.notes: Can hide actor heads near pond/zen path.

objects.notes: Should not be accidentally baked into the zen sand sprite.

objects.label: Koi pond water and lilies

collision.notes: Red blocked area should cover water, not the surrounding fence/path.

objects.notes: Should be baked into ground with water collision; not a pasted rectangular prop.

objects.label: Koi pond fence and posts

collision.notes: Fence posts/rails need local blockers around the pond edge.

occlusion.notes: Actors can pass in front of lower fence and behind upper fence.

objects.notes: Likely split into upper fence, lower fence, and side-post occluders in Tiled.

objects.label: Small bridge and rail left of pond

collision.notes: Bridge rail posts are narrow blockers; bridge deck may be walkable.

occlusion.notes: Left rail can hide actors crossing near the pond.

objects.notes: Bridge/rail is separate from the pond water in the flat PNG.

objects.label: Right pond rock and flower cluster

collision.notes: Rock can block; flowers should remain decorative.

objects.notes: Track as a cluster so small flower detail is not forgotten.

objects.label: Lower pond lantern

occlusion.notes: Tall enough to hide actor lower body at close range.

objects.notes: Only partially visible in Apex crop; still belongs to Apex pond composition.

collision.notes: Decor only unless final art contains large stones.

objects.notes: Split from the old lower-flower-strip so path space is not swallowed.

objects.notes: Separates training yard from dojo path in the reference.

occlusion.notes: Mostly behind zen garden; may not need actor occlusion unless path enters that area.

objects.notes: Should be baked or low occlusion, not dominate the pond/zen scene.

objects.notes: Right edge detail near zen banner and pond.
